entry.title: nternal Order Budget Exceed Error | PO 4700004639 Item 45 | IO 100018736
entry.content:
Please look into an issue with Purchase Order line item processing due to an internal order budget constraint.

Details of the Issue:

  • Purchase Order (PO): 4700004639

  • PO Line Item: 45

  • Internal Order (IO): 100018736

  •

entry.title: kob1 by the variant selection orders no actual line items were selected-KB420
entry.content: We use transaction kob1- Orders: Actual Line Items or S_ALR_87012993- Orders: Actual/Plan/Variance. When the selection variant orders is filled in selection parameter 'Order Group'  report returns error message KB420 "No actual line items were selected".  However there are actual line items by the orders which are contented in this order group when they  are filled in selection parameter Order. There are no issues with authorization.

entry.title: KSH2 Kostenstellengruppen anlegen
entry.content:
KSH2 In der EHP6 öffnet sich ein Eingabefeld mit 5 Eingabemöglichkeiten.

In EHP8 ist dies dann nicht mehr möglich.

Hier kann nur noch eine Kostenstelle angelegt werden.

entry.title: kob1 by the variant selection orders no actual line items were selected-KB420
entry.content: We use transaction kob1- Orders: Actual Line Items or S_ALR_87012993- Orders: Actual/Plan/Variance. When the selection variant orders is filled in selection parameter 'Order Group'  report returns error message KB420 "No actual line items were selected".  However there are actual line items by the orders which are contented in this order group when they  are filled in selection parameter Order. There are no issues with authorization.

entry.title: Internal order description is not visible in KOH3
entry.content:
Hi All,

in KOH3 we cannot see the description of internal orders which is visible in KOH2

entry.title: KOB1n and KOB1 is not matching with trial balance
entry.content: KOB1n and KOB1 is not matching with trial balance, while running kob1n report company code wise the balance is not zero but as per trial the balance is zero also, this is impacting financial closing.

entry.title: We are facing issue while doing KKS1 for plant level, there is issue in one Internal Order
entry.content:
We are facing issue while doing KKS1 for plant level, there is issue in one Internal Order.

Please find attached document for reference.

entry.title: Not Able to Partial Retire Asset with T-code - F-92
entry.content:
Asset code – 1000044114
Company code – 1000
Acquisition date – 31.07.2026 Current Year

It is not able to do Partial Retire with T-code F-92 and Transaction Type is used 210

But It is working for different Asset code

Asset code – 1100068355
Company code – 1000
Acquisition date – 31.07.2026 Current Year

For this Asset code entry is posted successfully with Transaction Type 210

entry.title: KP26 Price Planning Error: Check the customizing for Business Trans. Types in plan (Period lock)
entry.content:
Hi Team,

While executing the transaction code KP26 we are getting the error "Check the customizing for Business Trans. Types in plan (Period lock) " in D3P system Message No. FINS_BTTYPE_CHECKS006 . So kindly check this issue & provide a solution.

Thanks & Regards

Sachin Patil

entry.title: KP26 Price Planning Error: Check the customizing for Business Trans. Types in plan (Period lock)
entry.content:
Hi Team,

While executing the transaction code KP26 we are getting the error "Check the customizing for Business Trans. Types in plan (Period lock) " in D3P system Message No. FINS_BTTYPE_CHECKS006 . So kindly check this issue & provide a solution.

Thanks & Regards

Sachin Patil

entry.title: Transaction KB21N – Location Currency Not As Expected
entry.content: When performing a Direct Activity Allocation using transaction KB21N on a Production Order, the system calculates an unexpected local currency amount (ARS). The computed value does not match the expected value based on exchange rate type 'P' maintained in transaction OB08.

entry.title: Error AA629 ARAW
entry.content:
Dear Team

I know there are KBA articles like  3072527  related to this error, but unfortunately the description is not clear.

Could you please support me in understanding why this is not working? I am facing an issue in the test environment when I try to decrease the asset APC amount.

With revaluation, the gain posting works (movement type 800), but the opposite scenario — revaluation with loss — does not work.

Error is : Enter a transaction type that matches the values of fixed asset 300000000153-0000300000000153-0000

Movemtn type 892

Message No. AA629

Could you please help me understand why this is happening?

Thank you for your support.

Best regards,

Alexander

entry.title: Issue in order settlement thorugh KO88
entry.content:
Dear SAP team,

 Not able to  perform the settlement for the orders thorough KO88, as they relate to an asset fiscal year 2025 that has already been closed. You would like to know whether there is any option to execute the settlement process without reopening fiscal year 2025.

Please check and advise on this and do the needful.

Thank you,

Regards,

Narasimha

entry.title: technical clearing entry posting for oprational part but not valuated part
entry.content: technical clearing entry posting for oprational part but not valuated part in migo

entry.title: technical clearing entry posting for oprational part but not valuated part
entry.content: technical clearing entry posting for oprational part but not valuated part

entry.title: Error AFABN
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We are running t-code AFABN, but we have an error message AAPO191 for area 08 that has been created as an inflation area.

We have checked the configuration in AO90

The accounts area created for company code G235

Asset master date in AS03 is created correctly

Value created in AW01N has been created correctly, and depreciation is planned

We have check sap note

entry.title: Message No. F0379 When F110S
entry.content: Message No. F0379 When F110S background job execution

entry.title: OKB9 ERROT -An entry already exists with the same key
entry.content:
Hi Team,

we are facing issue in OKB9 tcode , we are creating new entry Profit centre and cost  centre but it showing  ERROT -An entry already exists with the same key, when we searching in table TKA3P we not found same entry , please check and suggest .

 

Regards,

Ram

entry.title: Picking zero price from sub- component to FG Code - and also allowed to released cost est with error
entry.content:
Dear Team,

 

We are facing issue as cost estimate released even with errors. so please let me know what was the reason it was allowed to release cost estimate and how to restrict this?

please find the attachment and provide safest solution

Thanks,

M.Niranjan.

entry.title: Combined street field in DMEE ZCGI_XML_CT_V9
entry.content:
Hello,

Financial institutions have obliged ISO 20022 standard for bank files with structured address elements. As reaction, we have installed DMEE CGI_XML_CT_V9 to get bank file in pain.001.001.09 format.

By testing we have noticed that street name and house number are concatenated. We are expecting them to be in separate fields - street name should be in node <Cdtr><PstlAdr><StrtNm>; house number in node <Cdtr><PstlAdr><BldgNb>.

By debugging, we have seen that

In DMEE tree ZCGI_XML_CT_V9_UK, node <Cdtr><PstlAdr><StrtNm> uses exit function FI_CGI_DMEE_EXIT_W_BADI, which returns the value stored in FPAYHX-REF09, which is fetched from REGUH table - field ZSTRA 

Why does SAP standard do this and how can we solve it?

Best regards
